title: Analytical quality assurance at the Department for Education
body: "This guidance is for:   Department for Education (DfE) analysts external analysts working on behalf of DfE  those who commission or are accountable for analysis at DfE, such as senior responsible owners and policy or delivery commissioners   The framework explains the responsibilities and expectations around assuring the quality of analytical work.  The maturity model can be used by any organisation to assess the strength of their quality assurance processes.  "
